title: Weird view behaviour
poc: create table test (id int, s varchar(255));
select a.id, b.id from test a,test b where a.id < b.id;
create view test2 as select * from test;

select a.id, b.id from test2 a,test2 b where a.id <
 b.id;
key_bug_features: selecting from a view with self-join condition
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test2 (id int, s varchar(255), d date);
CREATE VIEW test_view AS SELECT id, s FROM test2 WHERE d IS NOT NULL;
SELECT a.id, b.id FROM test_view a, test_view b WHERE a.id < b.id;
